name: prompt-forge
description: Standalone HTML agentic-workflow compiler with WebGPU (WebLLM) + Ollama inference.

scripts.test: node test_features.js && node test_e2e_project.js && node test_zip_runs_tdd.js && node test_webgpu_local_http.js
scripts.models: python3 serve.py & sleep 1 && node list_webllm_models.js ; pkill -f 'python3 serve.py'
